name: Breakfast Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
Remove and discard crusts from the bread; cut into cubes. Toss lightly with cream cheese cubes, then place in a greased 13x9x2-inch baking pan. In a large mixing bowl, beat eggs. Add milk, maple syrup, and salt; mix well. Pour over the bread mixture. Cover and refrigerate for 8 hours or overnight. Remove from the refrigerator about 30 minutes before baking. Bake, uncovered, at 375°F for 40-45 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean. Let stand 5 minutes before cutting. Yield: 6-8 servings.
Alma Andrews of Live Oak, Florida notes, "I assemble this dish the day before our grandchildren visit, giving me more time for fun with them."
